notes: GitLab.com sign-in page. Clean layout with username/password form, 'Forgot your password?' link, Remember me checkbox, SSO provider buttons (Google, GitHub, Bitbucket, Salesforce), and Register tab. Replaces outlook-login (bot-protected).

endpoints.label: Sign In Form
endpoints.description: Username or email + password login form with Sign in submit button

endpoints.label: Forgot Password
endpoints.description: Forgot your password? link leading to password reset page

endpoints.label: SSO Providers
endpoints.description: Sign in with Google, GitHub, Bitbucket, and Salesforce OAuth buttons

endpoints.label: Register Tab
endpoints.description: Register tab or link to create a new GitLab account

endpoints.label: Explore GitLab
endpoints.description: Explore link to browse public projects without authentication

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Banner
endpoints.description: OneTrust cookie consent banner with Accept/Customize buttons
